# **Appendix**

![Untitled](MF%20Pledge%20optimizations/Untitled.png)

## Meeting notes

- Meeting notes Nishant - 23rd Feb
    - We moved the pledge to later stage because there were people whose application would fail after the pledge had to pay Bajaj 400 and TATA charges nothing.
    - When pf is paid then no charges. Then there are no charges for unpledging.
    - Team has no error understand.
    - Most errors occurred while auth stage of pledge. Users change their mobile number, pledge, or sell their holdings. In validation stage mostly partial pledge happens.
    - Partial pledging: KYC status is not updated, PAN Aadhaar seeding (This is a major reason)
    - Physical process for more than 5 cr, for non individuals (companies) Lien letter sign for companies
    - CAMS pledge API is synchronous, CAMS has not send response in few cases. Investigate them.
    - KFin gives callback in 15 mins. In case of TATA we do not create the account until we get a success from KFin. UI doesn’t show anything, in cases of partial pledging the limit is credit limit is reduced for the user. Previously we used to give sanction limit equal to pledged funds, now when the user wanted to pledge extra, they would have charged a line enhancement fees extra.
    - In cases of lender change, the order is CAMS fetch, KFin pledge, CAMS pledge.
    - For TATA the lodgement in automatic, for Bajaj lodgement is operational.
    - We do not allow pledging for less than 25k from the flow. But the user can get less than
- Meeting notes Arpit -24th Feb
    - The current logic for refetch is when the lender for pledge is different form the lender specified in the latest fetch
    - We only keep the latest fetch, others are not kept in records.
    - CAMS can giver error in init or validation.
    - KFin can give errors in init, validation and in callback (usually 15 mins after the pledge)
    - For KFin we store the complete fetch not the lender specifc filtered version that we do.
    - Lalit’s point on staleness was that why should we make the journey harder when we don’t know that the error will occur in this case. For this I should present data of fetch staleness vs error percentage.
    - Bajaj’s operational process is basically after our confirmation going on CAMS and KFin and checking themselves before lodging.
    - Tata’s process is trusting our response for lodgement, but they still do recon at the end of the day.
    - Folio is a logical construct. Each folio can have multiple ISINs, Same ISIN can be present in multiple folios. {Folio + ISIN} = Unique combination
    - Even when we fetch again the pledging journey there are 3 cases for the new fetch:
        - Has more funds: Since we have already taken confirmation on what the user wants to pledge, even when their are more folios or more funds in the folio the user will be able to pledge only the previously selected units.
        - Has less funds: For similar reason as above, this will either create error or partial pledging errors.
        - Has same funds: This is okay.
    - Error are folio level, either the complete folio will fail or whole will be successful. Even when one unit in a folio fails, the whole folio will fail. When a person sells funds after
- Data analysis understanding -27th Feb
    - Sheet: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1oLCAsDpiUjKsioQxO49W1dK4z2rTYx8or0xnDUoSXac/edit#gid=906789367
- Meeting with Ankit, Nishant and Arpit - 11th March
    1. Complete CAMS pledge failure is not handled in product.
    2. For KFin pledge we just push the users forward and if we receive errors we remove KFin from limit.
    3. Issues discussed with Nishant: 
        1. [For Bajaj → Tata] CAMS Fetch (Success) → KFin pledge (Success) → CAMS Pledge (Complete failure): No way to go and fetch CAMS now.
        2. CAMS Staleness is an issue 
        3. Init/Auth failures are not handled. 
    4. Next steps: Do updated analysis and discuss error wise solutioning with Arpit on 12th March 2024
- Re-Fetch + selection cases
    - Less units/folios than selected. - Few units/folios are missing. Ne
    - More units/folios than selected. - Don’t do anything.
    - No units/folios selected available.
        - Few unselected folios are available
        - No folios are available
